title: Assistant Manager, Human Resources
description:
We are looking for an Assistant Manager, Human Resources to join our team!

As an Assistant Manager, Human Resources, we rely on you to:

  • Provide Human Resources business partnering for a Resort and Attraction (2 entities)
  • Perform talent acquisitions and coordinate recruitment and selection
  • Work closely with outsource payroll vendor for monthly payroll processing
  • Manage and maintain payroll information to ensure timely, compliant and accurate payroll payment including validation of overtime calculations and any other allowances or incentives to be paid accurately
  • Process and validate payroll information pertaining to new joiners, leaver, casuals etc. including calculation, payment and settlement of wage-related fees according to local legislation and company policies
  • Ability to build and promote employee engagement activities
  • Handles employees' enquiries

We are looking for someone who:

  • Preferably possesses relevant experience in payroll, administrative, functions and processes for all employees include casual and contractors
  • Has excellent knowledge of local labour laws pertaining to payroll and wage assessments
  • Has strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively across teams 
  • Understanding of human resources payroll processes and procedures
  • Knowledgeable in generating and consolidating payroll reports and experience in calculations of FTE
  • Experiences in human resources operations and relevant experience as Human Resources Business Partner

We Offer

  • 5-day work week
  • Learning and Development opportunities for career development
  • Medical and insurance coverage
  • Special employee discount within Shangri-La Group
  • Duty Meals and shuttle bus provided to Sentosa Island

If you ae the right person, what are you waiting for? Click the apply button now!

postedCompany.description:
Shangri-La Rasa Sentosa, Singapore

At Shangri-La Group we are a heart-warming family. We share something powerful – our genuine care and respect for others. Our strength lies beyond our harmonious surroundings and hideaway locations. It lies in our core values that guide us to treat each and everyone with honour, as kin, as family. We strive to be the preferred employer by providing great benefits, tranquil and sincere working environment, work-life balance and effort recognitions.

Just 15 minutes from the city, Shangri-La Rasa Sentosa, Singapore is the country’s only beachfront resort, offering 454 guest rooms and suites, each with a private balcony or terrace boasting views of the sea or lush greenery. The resort delivers exceptional service, creating the ideal island retreat for guests to unwind and enjoy a range of experiences, including sea sports on the private beach, fun-filled activities for all ages, indulgent spa treatments, and delightful beachside dining.
postedCompany.name: SENTOSA BEACH RESORT PTE LTD
